reasoning: The control IA-5(14) focuses on managing the content of PKI trust stores for PKI-based authentication, which is a specific aspect of authenticator management. Kubernetes does not natively manage PKI trust stores in the same way cloud IAM services manage password policies. Kubernetes can use PKI for authentication (e.g., client certificates), but the management of trust stores is typically handled outside of Kubernetes, often at the infrastructure or cloud provider level. Therefore, there is no direct equivalent Kubernetes security check for this control.
title: Authenticator Management - Authenticator management | managing content of pki trust stores for pki-based au
